# Complex Composite Action

<p align="right">
  <img src="https://github.com/marketplace/actions/Complex+Composite+Action/icon" alt="" height="50"/>
</p>

> A comprehensive, valid composite GitHub Action for schema conformance testing.

## Usage

<code>
- uses: your-org/@main
  with:
    config-path: # Path to configuration file
    custom-env: # Custom environment variable
    retries: # Number of retries (default: 3)
    verbose: # Enable verbose logging (default: false)
</code>

## Inputs

- **config-path**: Path to configuration file (**required**)

- **custom-env**: Custom environment variable

- **retries**: Number of retries (default: 3)

- **verbose**: Enable verbose logging (default: false)

## Outputs

- **log-path**: Path to the log file

- **result**: The result of the action

## Example

See the [action.yml](./action.yml) for a full reference.
